Source: RFC 3439 - Some Internet Architectural Guidelines and Philosophy
CleanExtraction: Complexity impedes scaling; feature richness can increase system complexity.
HouseUse: Keep doctrine wash as thin route enhancer, not heavy stage.

Source: Lean Enterprise Institute - Lean Thinking and Practice
CleanExtraction: Specify value, map value stream, remove waste, create flow and pull, repeat improvement.
HouseUse: Start washes from value and remove or park non-value steps.

CleanExtraction: Extra information competes with relevant information and weakens visibility.
HouseUse: Treat extra rule text as visibility cost unless it helps the current proof.

CleanExtraction: Good design is useful, understandable, honest, detailed, and as little as possible.
HouseUse: Make house structure useful and honest, not decorative ceremony.

Source: John Maeda - The Laws of Simplicity
CleanExtraction: Reduce, organize, save time, learn, preserve meaning, accept some things cannot simplify.
HouseUse: Use simplicity as compression, not erasure.

Source: Fred Brooks - No Silver Bullet copy
CleanExtraction: Separate essential difficulty from accidental difficulty; no single technique removes the essence.
HouseUse: Remove accidental ceremony before touching essential proof or meaning.

CleanExtraction: Separate logic, state, control, essential complexity, and accidental complexity.
HouseUse: Separate goal, artifact, proof, authority, and next state before simplifying.

Source: Parnas - On the Criteria to Be Used in Decomposing Systems into Modules
CleanExtraction: Decomposition should improve flexibility and comprehensibility, allowing one module to be studied at a time.
HouseUse: Keep house lanes inspectable one at a time.

Source: Stanford Engineering - Conquering Complexity With Simple Rules
CleanExtraction: Useful simple rules are few, tailored, activity-specific, and leave discretion.
HouseUse: Prefer one to three task-specific rules over broad command piles.

CleanExtraction: Working complex systems usually evolve from working simple systems.
HouseUse: Protect the smallest working stage-one core before expansion.
